violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Several boxes of food items being stored on the floor of the walk-in freezer in the back storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare wood shelving in the deli cooler are not a smooth nonabsorbent surface. Needs to be sealed.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape on the "proofer" door is not an easily cleanable surface. Drawers in the Caribou needs to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the deli has excess food build-up and needs to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer sink in the Caribou Coffee was measuring at 0ppm quat at the time of inspection.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single-use clam shell containers being stored on the floor in the back dry storage area.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. HACCP plan was not being followed. Cooler product and thermometer calibration logs were last completed in April of 2019.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of donuts, bread and cookie dough were on the bare floor of the walk-in freezer in the back room.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket with sanitizer solution and towel in the Caribou Coffee tested zero concentration at time of testing.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare wood shelves in the walk-in deli cooler are not a cleanable surface.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Duct tape on the proofer in the bakery has duct tape in place of a proper seal. Shelving in the bakery area has chipped wood and is not a cleanable surface.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. The sanitizer sink located in the Caribou Coffee was observed having dishes in it tested at 0ppm at the time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --The paper towels at the produce hand sink were not self dispensing.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly traps were located above the sink and prep area in the deli/bakery.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. HACCP plan was not being followed. Cooler product and thermometer calibration logs were last completed in April of 2019.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
